steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The student wants an example of a country that uses "dinar" in its currency name. The notes provide one such country: Bahrain, whose currency is the Bahraini dinar.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
Choice C names a specific country (Bahrain) and shows it uses "dinar" in its currency name — exactly the example required. A is about etymology, B is general (no specific country), and D doesn't address dinar usage as a currency name.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
